overall.description: Third-person game footage of a hooded character hiking through a snowy mountain landscape during golden hour, ascending from a valley past rock formations to a high ridge with panoramic views.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with tall rock monolith

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow towards the bright sun, approaching the tall rock pillar on the right

entered.detail: massive vertical rock monolith covered in snow patches, silhouetted against the sky
deep snow covering the ground with sparse vegetation poking through
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating lens flare and backlighting
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy valley during golden hour, approaching a massive rock pillar on the right. The sun sits low and bright directly ahead, casting long shadows across the snow field while distant mountains frame the horizon.

events.description: sun moves from directly ahead to the left side as character ascends the slope, reducing glare
mountain lake becomes visible in the valley below to the right

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky slope away from the valley floor, moving steadily uphill

entered.detail: frozen or calm lake visible in the valley below, surrounded by snow-covered terrain
steep rocky terrain with exposed stone and patches of snow
steep drop-off at the edge of the path revealing the valley below

segments.scene_description: Leaving the valley floor, the character ascends a rocky slope as the sun shifts to the left. The terrain transitions from snow to exposed rock, and a mountain lake becomes visible in the valley below. The tall rock pillar from the valley is now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside ridge with steep drops

events.description: character slows pace to carefully traverse the narrow rocky ledge with steep drops

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge with steep drops to the right side

entered.detail: deep mountain valley with steep rocky walls dropping far below the path
vertical rock wall rising immediately to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows to a rocky ridge with a cliff face on the left and a steep drop into the valley on the right. The character proceeds carefully along this exposed section, with the mountain lake now out of view below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high mountain ridge with panoramic peak views

events.description: emerging from narrow cliff path onto open ridge with expansive 360-degree mountain vistas

agents.ego_description: ascending the final snow-covered ridge towards the summit, surrounded by panoramic mountain views

entered.detail: expansive view of multiple snow-covered mountain ranges extending to the horizon
jagged mountain peaks covered in snow and ice visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Reaching the high ridge, the scene opens to panoramic views of snow-capped peaks in all directions. The terrain returns to snow cover as the character approaches the summit, with the sun now positioned to the left casting warm light across the mountain ranges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a wide, sun-drenched snowy valley to a high mountain ridge with panoramic views. It begins with the character walking across a snow field toward a massive rock pillar, with the low golden sun casting long shadows directly ahead. As the character leaves the valley floor, the terrain transitions from snow to exposed rock on a rising slope, revealing a mountain lake below while the sun shifts to the left. The path then narrows into a precarious rocky ridge with a steep cliff face, before finally opening up onto a snow-covered summit. The scene concludes with a sweeping vista of distant snow-capped peaks bathed in warm, lateral light.
